requirements.task_name: Start booking the cheapest garden-view room with breakfast for a June weekend stay
requirements.task_description: Find garden-view rooms with breakfast for June 12–14, 2026 for 2 adults, sort by price low to high, pick the cheapest, choose the lowest-price rate, and proceed to the payment step.

required_variables.set_condition: After results are computed and sorted, when searchAvailableRooms is called with checkInDate === '2026-06-12', checkOutDate === '2026-06-14', adults === 2, children is 0 or undefined, filters.viewType === 'garden_view', filters.amenities includes 'breakfast_included', and sortBy === 'price_asc'.
required_variables.value_to_set: { checkInDate: checkInDate, checkOutDate: checkOutDate, adults: adults, children: typeof children === 'number' ? children : 0, filters: filtersObj, sortBy: sort }
required_variables.reason: Persist the exact search/filter/sort parameters used for the task so the evaluator can confirm the user applied garden-view and breakfast-included filters and sorted by price low to high.

required_variables.set_condition: In the same call where task1_roomSearchParams is set, after results have been sorted and results.length > 0.
required_variables.value_to_set: { roomId: results[0].room.id, ratePlanId: results[0].cheapestRatePlan.id, totalPrice: results[0].totalPrice, averageNightlyPrice: results[0].averageNightlyPrice, currency: results[0].currency }
required_variables.reason: Capture which room+rate-plan combination was actually the cheapest qualifying garden-view, breakfast-included option at the time of search so the evaluator can later confirm that the booking started for this exact option.

requirements.task_name: Make a dinner reservation for four at the earliest available time between 7:00–8:00 PM
requirements.task_description: Reserve for 4 guests on a date two weeks from today, indoor seating, window table if available, selecting the earliest available time between 7:00 PM and 8:00 PM and submitting the reservation.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getRestaurantAvailableTimeSlots is called with partySize >= 4 and seatingArea === 'indoor'. (This captures the relevant search context even if fromTime/toTime differ.)
required_variables.value_to_set: { reservationDate: reservationDate, partySize: partySize, seatingArea: seatingArea, fromTime: fromTime || null, toTime: toTime || null, availableSlots: results }
required_variables.reason: Store the set of available time slots shown to the user for an indoor table for four, so the evaluator can check whether the ultimately reserved time was the earliest available between 19:00 and 20:00.

required_variables.set_condition: After a reservation is successfully created (reservation is non-null) and partySize >= 4 and seatingArea === 'indoor'.
required_variables.value_to_set: { reservationId: reservation.id, timeSlotId: reservation.timeSlotId, reservationDate: reservation.reservationDate, reservationTime: reservation.reservationTime, partySize: reservation.partySize, seatingArea: reservation.seatingArea, tableLocationPreference: reservation.tableLocationPreference, guestName: reservation.guestName, guestEmail: reservation.guestEmail, guestPhone: reservation.guestPhone, specialRequests: reservation.specialRequests }
required_variables.reason: Capture the specific reservation created for this task so it can be matched against task2_timeSlotSearch to verify that the chosen time is the earliest available between 7:00–8:00 PM and that indoor + window-table preferences and contact fields were correctly applied.

requirements.task_name: Start booking the highest-rated spa package under $400 per night for a 2-night stay
requirements.task_description: Filter offers for spa access and late checkout, cap price at $400, sort by guest rating, pick the highest-rated spa package that meets criteria, and start booking it for a 2-night Friday–Sunday stay for 2 adults.

required_variables.set_condition: After searchOffers filters and sorts the offers, when filters.includesSpaAccess === true, filters.includesLateCheckout === true, typeof filters.maxNightlyRate === 'number' and filters.maxNightlyRate <= 400, and sortBy === 'guest_rating_desc'.
required_variables.reason: Record that the user searched offers with both spa access and late checkout enabled and a max nightly rate of $400, sorted by guest rating high-to-low, as required by the task.

required_variables.set_condition: In the same call where task3_offerSearchParams is set, after sorting and when result.length > 0.
required_variables.reason: Persist the offer ID of the highest-rated qualifying spa package presented to the user so the evaluator can check that the subsequent booking (in bookings) was started for this specific top-ranked package.

requirements.task_name: Purchase a $150 restaurant gift card for email delivery to a friend
requirements.task_description: Configure a $150 restaurant/dining gift card with email delivery, recipient and purchaser details, and proceed to checkout.

requirements.task_name: Submit an inquiry for a corporate meeting for 20 people with specific amenities
requirements.task_description: Submit a half-day corporate meeting inquiry for 20 attendees with projector, screen, and coffee service, specifying date/time and contact details.

requirements.task_name: Build a vegetarian dinner plan with 1 appetizer, 2 mains, and 1 dessert under set price limits
requirements.task_description: Use the dinner menu to apply a vegetarian filter, then add 1 appetizer (< $15), 2 mains (each < $30), and 1 dessert (< $12) to a dinner plan and save it.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getMenuItems is called with mealType === 'dinner' and filters && filters.isVegetarian === true.
required_variables.value_to_set: { mealType: mealType, filters: filt, sortBy: sort }
required_variables.reason: Record that the user requested the dinner menu with a vegetarian filter applied, satisfying the requirement to use menu filters rather than just manually selecting vegetarian items.

requirements.task_name: Choose a room with the largest bed under $250 per night for a solo business stay
requirements.task_description: Search for a 3-night weekday stay next month for 1 adult, filter rooms under $250 per night, compare at least three options, and proceed to book the room with the largest bed (tie-broken by lower price).

required_variables.set_condition: After results are computed and sorted, when adults === 1, (children is 0 or undefined), filtersObj has a numeric maxPricePerNight that is <= 250, and the difference between checkInDate and checkOutDate corresponds to a 3-night stay (as computed similarly to _calculateStayNightsAndPriceBreakdown).
required_variables.value_to_set: { checkInDate: checkInDate, checkOutDate: checkOutDate, adults: adults, children: typeof children === 'number' ? children : 0, filters: filtersObj, sortBy: sort }
required_variables.reason: Persist the key search parameters (dates, occupancy, max price) for the solo business stay so the evaluator can confirm that the room comparison and eventual booking were based on a correctly filtered set of rooms under $250 for a 3-night, 1-adult weekday stay.

requirements.task_name: Sign up for the hotel newsletter with specific interest preferences and monthly frequency
requirements.task_description: Subscribe with a given email, select interests in room offers and restaurant events, choose monthly frequency, consent to marketing, and submit.
